heading: Purchase of low-enriched uranium derived from Russian highly enriched uranium
label: 2364 Purchase of low-enriched uranium derived from Russian highly enriched uranium

children.heading: Sense of Congress
children.label: a Sense of Congress
children.text: It is the sense of Congress that the allies of the United States and other nations should participate in efforts to ensure that stockpiles of weapons-grade nuclear material are reduced.

children.heading: Actions by Secretary of State
children.label: b Actions by Secretary of State
children.text: Congress urges the Secretary of State to encourage, in consultation with the Secretary of Energy, other countries to purchase low-enriched uranium that is derived from highly enriched uranium extracted from Russian nuclear weapons.
